name: Black Olives with Tomatoes and Capers
recipeIngredient: 48 medium-sized canned, low-salt, pitted black olives, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil with the garlic and onion over moderate heat until they sizzle.
2. Add the tomatoes, breaking them up with your hands.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients: 16 ounces of salt-free whole tomatoes, 48 medium-sized canned low-salt pitted black olives (drained and rinsed), 1 tablespoon balsamic or good quality red wine vinegar, 1 tablespoon double concentrate tomato paste, 2 teaspoons sugar, and ½ tablespoon dried oregano.
4. Simmer the sauce until it is thick but still slightly liquid, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Serve over cooked pasta. Serves 4.
